ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data split */,
  "split_name" TEXT /* Name of the data split (e.g., targets, uses) */,
  "train_count" INTEGER /* Number of data points in the training split */,
  "test_count" INTEGER /* Number of data points in the testing split */,
  "validation_count" INTEGER /* Number of data points in the validation split */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of data points in the split */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the split was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the split */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the split */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the split is currently active or deprecated */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source or method used to create the split (e.g., manual, automated algorithm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner or user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external client) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* The format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "size_mb" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in megabytes */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the dataset is public or private */,
  "last_processed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the dataset was processed or analyzed */,
  "tags" TEXT /* A list of tags or labels associated with the dataset for categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, client) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A list of permissions or roles the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_splits" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between dataset and split */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "split_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data split */,
  "train_count" INTEGER /* Number of data points in the training split for this dataset */,
  "test_count" INTEGER /* Number of data points in the testing split for this dataset */,
  "validation_count" INTEGER /* Number of data points in the validation split for this dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the association */,
  "is_balanced" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the split is balanced across training, testing, and validation */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* The version of the algorithm used to create the split */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_splits_split_id FOREIGN KEY ("split_id") REFERENCES data_splits ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_splits_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
